message.content:
Update the file C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\Home.tsx to replace the amber/yellow color scheme with a deep purple/metallic theme. 

Rules:
- Read the file first
- Replace ALL occurrences of these color patterns:
  - `#fbbf24` → `#a855f7` (primary purple)
  - `#d97706` → `#7c3aed` (dark violet)
  - `#f59e0b` → `#c084fc` (light purple/accent)
  - `amber` → `purple` in tailwind classes (e.g., `bg-amber-400` → `bg-purple-500`, `text-amber-500` → `text-purple-400`)
  - `emerald-500` → `purple-400`, `emerald-400` → `purple-300`
  - `bg-primary` stays, `text-primary` stays (these reference the tailwind config which is already updated)
  - `text-black` on primary buttons → `text-white`
  - Any `shadow-primary/20` is fine, keep it
  - `bg-white text-black` buttons → `bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white`
  - For logo elements: `bg-primary ... text-black` → `bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 ... text-white`
  - `bg-[#09090b]` → `bg-[#0c0815]`
  - `bg-[#0a0a0f]` → `bg-[#050208]`
  - `border-white/5` → `border-purple-500/10` (for major sections/cards only, not for everything)
  - `bg-white/5` → `bg-purple-500/5`
  - `hover:bg-white/10` → `hover:bg-purple-500/10`

Be thorough - read the whole file, make all necessary edits. Do NOT change any functionality, only colors/styling.

content.text: I'll start by reading the file to understand its full contents.

input.thought:
Let me catalog all the changes needed by going through the file line by line:

Line 69: bg-primary/10 - KEEP (text-primary and bg-primary stay)
Line 71: bg-primary/10, border-primary/20, text-primary - KEEP
Line 77: bg-primary, text-black → bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white (logo element)
Line 77: shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(251,191,36,0.4)] → update rgba to purple (#a855f7 = 168,85,247)

Line 110: bg-white/5 → bg-purple-500/5, group-hover:text-black → group-hover:text-white, group-hover:bg-primary stays
Line 135: border-white/5 → border-purple-500/10 (major card section), bg-white/[0.02] - keep as is (subtle)
Line 163: shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(251,191,36,0.05)] → update rgba to purple
Line 164: bg-primary text-black → bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white (badge "Le Futur")

Line 204: bg-white/5 → bg-purple-500/5

Line 258: bg-primary text-black → bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white (step number)
Line 315: shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(251,191,36,0.1)] → update rgba to purple
Line 320: bg-primary text-black → bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white (badge "Le Choix Expert")
Line 326: bg-primary text-black → bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white (plan icon), bg-white/5 → bg-purple-500/5
Line 354: hover:bg-amber-500 → hover:bg-purple-400, text-black → text-white

Wait, let me re-read the rules more carefully:

- `bg-primary` stays, `text-primary` stays
- `text-black` on primary buttons → `text-white`
- For logo elements: `bg-primary ... text-black` → `bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 ... text-white`
- `bg-[#0a0a0f]` → `bg-[#050208]`
- `border-white/5` → `border-purple-500/10` (for major sections/cards only)
- `bg-white/5` → `bg-purple-500/5`
- `hover:bg-white/10` → `hover:bg-purple-500/10`
- `amber` → `purple` in tailwind classes (e.g., `bg-amber-400` → `bg-purple-500`, `text-amber-500` → `text-purple-400`)
- `#fbbf24` → `#a855f7` (in rgba values)
- `bg-white text-black` buttons → `bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white`

Let me re-analyze each specific line:

Line 77: `bg-primary flex items-center justify-center text-black font-bold` - This is the logo "C". Rule says: For logo elements: `bg-primary ... text-black` → `bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 ... text-white`. So change `bg-primary` to `bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600` and `text-black` to `text-white`.
Also `shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(251,191,36,0.4)]` - the 251,191,36 is #fbbf24 (amber). Change to 168,85,247 for #a855f7.

Line 109: `hover:bg-white/5` → `hover:bg-purple-500/5`, `border border-white/5` → `border border-purple-500/10` (major section card)

Line 110: `bg-white/5` → `bg-purple-500/5`, `group-hover:text-black` → `group-hover:text-white`

Line 135: `border border-white/5` → `border border-purple-500/10` (major card)

Line 163: `shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(251,191,36,0.05)]` - change rgba value

Line 164: `bg-primary text-black` → `bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white` (it's a badge)

Line 203: `bg-[#0a0a0f]` → `bg-[#050208]`
Line 204: `bg-white/5` → `bg-purple-500/5`

Line 217: `bg-[#0a0a0f]` → `bg-[#050208]`
Line 218: `bg-white/5` → `bg-purple-500/5`

Line 231: `bg-[#0a0a0f]` → `bg-[#050208]`
Line 232: `bg-white/5` → `bg-purple-500/5`

Line 247: `bg-white/5` → `bg-purple-500/5` (major section)

Line 258: `bg-primary text-black` - This is a step number circle. Apply the button rule: text-black → text-white. But should bg-primary stay? The rule says bg-primary stays. But also says text-black on primary buttons → text-white. So: `bg-primary text-white`.

Actually wait - the step circle is not exactly a button, but it has `bg-primary text-black`. According to the rules, `bg-primary` stays, but `text-black` on primary elements should become `text-white`. Let me apply that.

Line 315: `shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(251,191,36,0.1)]` → update rgba
Line 320: `bg-primary text-black` → apply same as badges: `bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white`
Line 326: `bg-primary text-black` → `bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white` for popular plan icon, `bg-white/5` → `bg-purple-500/5`

Line 354: `bg-primary hover:bg-amber-500 text-black` → `bg-primary hover:bg-purple-400 text-white`
Line 355: `bg-white/10 hover:bg-white text-white hover:text-black` → `bg-white/10 hover:bg-purple-500/10 text-white` (remove hover:text-black). Wait, the rule says `bg-white text-black` buttons → `bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white`. But this is `bg-white/10` not `bg-white`. And it's a hover state `hover:bg-white`. Let me think...

The non-popular button: `bg-white/10 hover:bg-white text-white hover:text-black border border-white/10`
- `bg-white/10` → could map to `bg-purple-500/5` or keep as is (it's a secondary button)
- `hover:bg-white` - this is hover to white, which would need changing. Following the button rule: maybe `hover:bg-purple-500/10`
- `hover:text-black` → remove since we don't want text-black

Actually looking more carefully at the rules: `hover:bg-white/10` → `hover:bg-purple-500/10`. The non-popular button has `hover:bg-white` (no opacity), which is different. And `bg-white text-black` buttons → `bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white`. This seems to apply to the hover state maybe? Let me reconsider.

For the non-popular button, it seems like:
- Keep `bg-white/10` or change to `bg-purple-500/10`
- `hover:bg-white hover:text-black` → `hover:bg-purple-500/10` and remove `hover:text-black` (or keep hover:text-white)

Let me be practical. The intent is to go from amber/white to purple. So for the non-popular button:
`bg-white/10 hover:bg-white text-white hover:text-black border border-white/10` → `bg-purple-500/10 hover:bg-purple-500/20 text-white border border-purple-500/10`

And for the popular button:
`bg-primary hover:bg-amber-500 text-black shadow-lg shadow-primary/20` → `bg-primary hover:bg-purple-400 text-white shadow-lg shadow-primary/20`

Let me now proceed with making all edits.

content.text: Let me do a final scan to make sure no amber/yellow references or old hex values remain.

All amber/yellow color references have been completely removed. The file is clean. Here is a summary of every change made to `C:\Users\User\Downloads\SaaS X-Final-Rick-Test\pages\Home.tsx`:

---

**Hero Section - Logo Element (line 77)**
- `bg-primary` changed to `bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600`
- `text-black` changed to `text-white`
- `rgba(251,191,36,0.4)` changed to `rgba(168,85,247,0.4)` in the shadow
- Comment on line 68 updated from "Yellow" to "Purple"

**Features Grid Cards (lines 109-110)**
- `hover:bg-white/5` changed to `hover:bg-purple-500/5`
- `border-white/5` changed to `border-purple-500/10`
- `bg-white/5` (icon background) changed to `bg-purple-500/5`
- `group-hover:text-black` changed to `group-hover:text-white`

**SEO vs AEO Comparison - SEO Classic Card (line 135)**
- `border-white/5` changed to `border-purple-500/10`

**AEO Modern Card (lines 163-164)**
- `rgba(251,191,36,0.05)` changed to `rgba(168,85,247,0.05)` in the shadow
- "Le Futur" badge: `bg-primary text-black` changed to `bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white`

**3 Pillar Cards (lines 203-204, 217-218, 231-232) -- all three pillars**
- `bg-[#0a0a0f]` changed to `bg-[#050208]`
- `bg-white/5` (icon circle) changed to `bg-purple-500/5`

**Process Section (line 247)**
- `bg-white/5` changed to `bg-purple-500/5`

**Step 1 Circle (line 258)**
- `bg-primary text-black` changed to `bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white`

**Pricing Section - Popular Plan (lines 314-315)**
- `rgba(251,191,36,0.1)` changed to `rgba(168,85,247,0.1)` in the shadow

**Popular Badge "Le Choix Expert" (line 320)**
- `bg-primary text-black` changed to `bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white`

**Plan Icon (line 326)**
- Popular state: `bg-primary text-black` changed to `bg-gradient-to-br from-purple-500 to-violet-600 text-white`
- Non-popular state: `bg-white/5` changed to `bg-purple-500/5`

**Pricing Buttons (lines 353-355)**
- Popular button: `hover:bg-amber-500` changed to `hover:bg-purple-400`, `text-black` changed to `text-white`
- Non-popular button: `bg-white/10 hover:bg-white text-white hover:text-black border border-white/10` changed to `bg-purple-500/10 hover:bg-purple-500/20 text-white border border-purple-500/10`

All `bg-primary`, `text-primary`, `border-primary/*`, `bg-primary/*`, and `shadow-primary/*` references were intentionally preserved as they reference the Tailwind config which is already updated. No functionality was changed -- only colors and styling.
